China raises retail diesel prices by 400 yuan per metric ton from April 7, state planning agency confirms.

data.title: Toshiba’s Breakthrough Algorithm Harnesses Edge of Chaos to Dramatically Boost Performance of its Quantum‑Inspired Computer
data.description: A groundbreaking third-generation simulated bifurcation algorithm has been developed by Toshiba in Kawasaki, Japan. This algorithm has significantly enhanced the performance of SBM, making it 100 times faster than before.

data.title: Syngenta Unveils VIRESTINA™ Technology, a Global Breakthrough in Controlling Grass Weeds
data.description: Syngenta, a renowned agricultural innovation company based in BASEL, Switzerland, has introduced the first selective herbicide in nearly four decades to combat resistant grass weeds in soybean and cotton fields. The groundbreaking technology, named VIRESTINA™, features the active ingredient metproxybicyclone. Following approval in Argentina, making it the initial country to endorse the technology, Syngenta has now globally launched VIRESTINA™. The company intends to expand the availability of this innovation to countries like Brazil, Australia, and the U.S. This move marks a significant advancement in the agricultural sector, addressing long-standing challenges in weed control with a pioneering solution.
Ford recalls U.S. vehicles over windshield wiper defect that may increase the risk of crashes, NHTSA confirms.
NHTSA reports Ford is recalling some U.S. vehicles due to faulty windshield wipers that could impair driver visibility.

data.title: Budweiser Honors 40 Years of FIFA World Cup™ Legacy with Limited-Edition Collectible Pack and Nostalgia-Themed Platform
data.description: In London today, Budweiser commemorates 40 years as the Official Beer Sponsor of the FIFA World Cup™. They mark the occasion with the release of the Budweiser® FIFA World Cup™ Anniversary Pack*, the largest limited-edition collectible pack to date. This pack features 11 unique designs representing each tournament from 1986 onwards, part of a global campaign filled with nostalgia. Budweiser has been integral in many memorable football moments.

data.title: Data journalist Ben Blatt looks for trends in sports stats and 'Wheel of Fortune' puzzles, like if Taylor Swift boosts N.F.L. ratings.
data.description: Ben Blatt, a data reporter at The Upshot, specializes in finding creative methods to address queries such as, "Is Taylor Swift truly boosting NFL viewership?"

data.title: Global Tech Firm Opens Prediction Market Infrastructure to Businesses Worldwide
data.description: In GŻIRA, Malta on April 7, 2026, SOFTSWISS, a global software provider, has introduced the SOFTSWISS Prediction Markets. This innovative B2B offering allows online casino and sportsbook operators to venture into event-based wagering, a swiftly expanding sector. The platform operates on fixed-odds and provides operators a gateway to enhance their customer engagement and offerings.

data.title: Routeware Expands UK Presence with Acquisition of PermiServ
data.description: Routeware announced today its increased dedication to supporting UK local authorities by providing upgraded solutions for resident engagement and service delivery. The company, known for its AI-powered waste and environmental services, aims to further assist in delivering improved services to the public. This initiative indicates Routeware's commitment to enhancing partnerships with UK communities and fostering environmentally sustainable practices. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, in London, solidifying their position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Easterseals Oregon to Feature in New Segment of All Access hosted by Andy Garcia
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Portland, Oregon, Easterseals Oregon will be featured on the TV show "All Access hosted by Andy Garcia" to discuss the importance of community inclusion and specialized support systems. The collaboration aims to shed light on these vital aspects. This partnership demonstrates a commitment to educating the public about the significance of these initiatives.

data.title: PyTorch Foundation Welcomes Helion as a Foundation-Hosted Project to Standardize Open, Portable, and Accessible AI Kernel Authoring
data.description: Today, on April 7, 2026 in Paris, the PyTorch Foundation, a key hub for open source AI supported by the Linux Foundation, revealed the inclusion of Helion in its network. Helion joins other prominent open source AI projects to streamline kernel development within the open AI ecosystem. This collaboration marks a significant step in simplifying the process for developers working in this domain.

data.title: Hankook Embarks on a Technical Asphalt Challenge at the WRC Croatia Rally 2026
data.description: The fourth leg of the 2026 World Rally Championship will happen in Rijeka, Croatia, including its surrounding regions, from April 9 to 12. Hankook's Ventus Z215 and Z210 tires will be used, ensuring accuracy in control and excellent traction on the diverse terrain of the Mediterranean, featuring unpredictable asphalt and mountain tracks. These tires are designed to offer the best performance exclusively for this event.
